name: GIGABYTE X670 AORUS ELITE AX ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - AMD X670 Chipset - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6600(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x4 M.2-25110 - 3x PCIe 4.0 x4 M.2 - USB-C 3.2 Gen 2x2 - HDMI 2.0 - 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: GIGABYTE X670 AORUS ELITE AX ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - AMD X670
description: AMD AM5 ATX motherboard with X670 chipset, DDR5 support, and Wi-Fi 6E for high-performance Ryzen builds.
